scripts.db:pull: for i in 1 2 3; do "/mnt/c/Program Files/RedHat/Podman/podman.exe" pull postgres:16-alpine && exit 0; echo "Pull attempt $i failed, retrying..."; done; exit 1
scripts.db:up: npm run db:pull && "/mnt/c/Program Files/RedHat/Podman/podman.exe" compose up -d
scripts.db:reset: "/mnt/c/Program Files/RedHat/Podman/podman.exe" compose down -v && "/mnt/c/Program Files/RedHat/Podman/podman.exe" compose up -d
